what_changed: ml_engine.py: Added SIGNAL_DIMENSIONS constant (18 dims). Updated extract_features() to include per-dimension dim_* features, fixed NoneType comparison bug in label_trade(), added pnl_pct support. Updated prepare_data() to include dim_* columns in feature matrix. Retrained models: 431 trades -> 29 features. ML engine is now live and learning from dimension-level signal data.

alpha_validation.py: Already built — ran it, saved report to data/alpha_validation_report.json and chief-decifer research panel. Early findings: mtf (+0.39), short_squeeze (+0.36), news (+0.27) are strongest; trend shows -0.18 (noisy at n=60, watch not act).
decisions: HMM regime detection deferred — wait for more trade data and stronger per-regime IC signal before replacing VIX-proxy.
ML engine stays active at ml_enabled=True; CV ROC-AUC 0.483 is expected at current data volume, safe to run.
what_next: Let trades accumulate. Re-run alpha_validation.py periodically (already wired to Chief Decifer research panel).
HMM regime detection — start when IC per-regime picture is clearer (target: ~200 records with dimension scores, currently 63).
